import{useEffect,useState,useCallback}from"react";import axios from"axios";import"./styles/Wishlist.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Wishlist(){const[wishlist,setWishlist]=useState([]);const studentId=localStorage.getItem("userId");const fetchWishlist=useCallback(()=>{axios.get(`http://localhost:5000/api/wishlist/student/${studentId}`).then(res=>setWishlist(res.data)).catch(err=>console.log(err));},[studentId]);useEffect(()=>{fetchWishlist();},[fetchWishlist]);const removeWishlist=async bookId=>{try{await axios.post("http://localhost:5000/api/wishlist/remove",{studentId,bookId});// Refresh the list
